reasoning: Lactate clearance is currently your primary limiter, as indicated by the 9.3% power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts. Your last ride showed a lower intensity, focusing on aerobic endurance, but now we need to step it up. Emigration Canyon provides a great setting to simulate Alpine Loop conditions and target your sustained power output during the climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x15min over-unders: 4 minutes at 218W, followed by 1 minute at 242W, repeated. Focus on maintaining form and control on the climbs.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
